summary: Frontend returnTo navigation flow testing complete. All 6 features tested and PASSING. Bell click from /mira-demo correctly passes returnTo=%2Fmira-demo. Back button from /notifications returns to /mira-demo. Notification row click passes returnTo=%2Fnotifications to ticket thread. Thread back button returns to /notifications. Error state shows Retry and Back buttons (never blank rule). Error back button navigates correctly.

integration_issues.flow: Some notification rows reference non-existent tickets
integration_issues.issue: Notifications with TKT-SHOP-* and TKT-MIRA-* prefixes return 'Ticket not found'. This is expected behavior for orphan/test tickets. Error state correctly shows Retry and Back buttons.

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.jsx line 61-62: Correctly encodes current path as returnTo parameter - navigate(`/notifications?returnTo=${encodeURIComponent(location.pathname)}`)
NotificationsInbox.jsx line 499-507: handleBack() correctly uses returnTo param from URL, with fallback to navigate(-1) then /mira-demo
NotificationsInbox.jsx line 284-288: handleNotificationClick correctly passes returnTo to ticket thread URL
TicketThread.jsx line 254-267: handleBack() correctly uses returnTo param with fallback chain: onClose() → returnTo → navigate(-1) → /mira-demo
TicketThread.jsx line 510-534: Error state shows Retry and Back buttons - never blank rule implemented correctly
All data-testid attributes present: notification-bell, back-btn, thread-back-btn, retry-load-btn, error-back-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: returnTo navigation flow verified complete. TCK-2026-000040 is a valid test ticket. TKT-SHOP-* and TKT-MIRA-* are orphan tickets that show error state (expected).

verified_features.notifications_back_uses_returnTo: PASS - Back button from /notifications returns to /mira-demo
verified_features.ticket_thread_back_uses_returnTo: PASS - Thread back button returns to /notifications
verified_features.error_state_has_buttons: PASS - Error shows 'Ticket not found' with Retry and Back buttons (never blank)
verified_features.error_back_navigates_correctly: PASS - Error back button navigates to returnTo destination
